title: Delivery Presentation payload
description: Deliverable-agnostic client delivery slide deck (decarb, RSRA, portfolio-analysis, retrofit, GRESB, ...). Injected into templates/delivery-presentation/layout-agent.html via <script id="report-data">. Title and Agenda slides are auto-generated from deck meta + section grouping; do NOT author them. Every field is nullable — missing fields hide their element.

deck.description: Deck-level metadata. Drives the auto-generated title slide and per-slide footers.

engagement_type.description: Eyebrow on the title slide, e.g. 'decarbonization plan delivery'

confidential.description: true shows a confidentiality mark on the title slide

slides.description: Content slides. Rendered GROUPED in fixed section order (background, methodology, assumptions, results, revisions) regardless of array order; in-section order is preserved. Each section may have multiple slides.

section.description: Section this slide belongs to. Fixed render order: background -> methodology -> assumptions -> results -> revisions. Unknown/missing sections render last.

eyebrow.description: Space Mono '// eyebrow' text; defaults to the section name

blocks.description: Content blocks, rendered top-to-bottom. Keep density modest: ~1-3 blocks per slide.

items.description: For bullets: array of strings. For stats: array of stat items. For bars: array of bar items. For waterfall: array of bridge components. For questions: array of question items.

rows.description: table only: rows of cell strings

title.description: trajectory / waterfall only: chart title rendered inside the chart card

unit_label.description: trajectory only: y-axis unit label, e.g. 'kgCO₂e/m²·yr'

bps_label.description: trajectory only: legend label for the stepped BPS target line, e.g. 'CO Reg 28 target — fines'. Defaults to 'BPS target — fines'

series.description: trajectory only: time series of carbon-intensity values. Every value nullable — a series with <2 points is simply not drawn; block hidden if series absent/empty. All values in the same unit (unit_label).

crrem_target.description: CRREM 1.5°C pathway value (dashed orange — drives stranding)

bps_target.description: BPS compliance target (stepped dashed ink — drives fines)

crrem_meta.description: trajectory only: appended to the CRREM legend label

stranding_year_bau.description: trajectory only: year the BAU line crosses the CRREM pathway — draws an annotation dot on the BAU line

stranding_year_planned.description: trajectory only: year the planned line strands (omit/null if beyond the modeled horizon)

note.description: trajectory only: caption line under the chart

net.description: waterfall only: the net bar, anchored to zero (ink). If amount omitted it is computed as the sum of items.

annotation.description: waterfall only: caption line under the chart

left.description: two_col only: blocks in the left column

right.description: two_col only: blocks in the right column

accent.description: true renders the dark green-gradient money tile (use sparingly: max one per results slide)

value.description: Numeric magnitude; bars scale to the max absolute value

items.description: waterfall only: sequential bridge components from 0. Negative amounts render orange (decrement), positive green.

amount.description: signed dollar amount (e.g. -4200000); labels render compact ($1.3M / −$3.4M)
